mapper.sql: id, code, node_type, scope, name, route_path, component_key, permission_code, parent_id, order_no, icon, hidden, status, required
mapper.select: SELECT FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE 1 = 1 AND scope = #{scope} ORDER BY order_no, id
SELECT FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentMenuId} AND node_type = 'button' AND required = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iam_admin_menu ( code, node_type, scope, name, route_path, component_key, permission_code, parent_id, order_no, icon, hidden, status, required ) VALUES (#{code}, #{nodeType}, #{scope}, #{name}, #{routePath}, #{componentKey}, #{permissionCode}, #{parentId}, #{orderNo}, #{icon}, #{hidden}, #{status}, #{required})
mapper.update: UPDATE iam_admin_menu SET node_type = #{nodeType}, scope = #{scope}, name = #{name}, route_path = #{routePath}, component_key = #{componentKey}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, parent_id = #{parentId}, order_no = #{orderNo}, icon = #{icon}, hidden = #{hidden}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE iam_admin_menu SET code = #{code} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.code, m.node_type, m.scope, m.name, m.route_path, m.component_key, m.permission_code, m.parent_id, m.order_no, m.icon, m.hidden, m.status, m.required FROM iam_admin_role_menu_relation relation JOIN role r ON r.id = relation.role_id JOIN iam_admin_menu m ON m.id = relation.menu_id WHERE r.code IN #{code} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.order_no, m.id

SELECT DISTINCT p.code, p.name, p.http_method, p.path_pattern FROM iam_role_permission rp JOIN role r ON r.id = rp.role_id JOIN iam_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE r.code IN #{code} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.code

SELECT menu_id FROM iam_admin_role_menu_relation relation JOIN iam_admin_menu menu ON menu.id = relation.menu_id WHERE relation.role_id = #{roleId} AND menu.node_type = #{nodeType} ORDER BY menu.order_no, menu.id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role WHERE id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iam_admin_role_menu_relation (role_id, menu_id, created_at) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{menuId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT parent_id FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE id IN #{id}
SELECT id FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE parent_id IN #{id} AND node_type = 'button' AND required = 1
SELECT scope FROM role WHERE id = #{roleId}
SELECT permission_code FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE id IN #{id}
SELECT id FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE node_type = 'menu' AND required = 1 AND scope = #{scope} AND status = 1
SELECT id FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE parent_id IN #{id} AND node_type = 'button' AND required = 1 AND status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT menu.permission_code FROM iam_admin_role_menu_relation relation JOIN role r ON r.id = relation.role_id JOIN iam_admin_menu menu ON menu.id = relation.menu_id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND menu.node_type = 'button' AND menu.status = 1 AND menu.permission_code IS NOT NULL
SELECT parent_id, permission_code FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE node_type = 'button' AND required = 1 AND parent_id IS NOT NULL AND scope = #{scope}
SELECT route_path, scope FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE route_path IS NOT NULL AND id <> #{selfId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE route_path = #{routePath} AND id <> #{selfId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iam_admin_menu WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND id <> #{selfId}

SELECT menu_id FROM iam_admin_role_menu_relation relation JOIN iam_admin_menu menu ON menu.id = relation.menu_id WHERE relation.role_id = #{roleId} AND menu.node_type IN #{nodeType} ORDER BY menu.order_no, menu.id
